fields.name: The Hole in the Wall Cafe
Paneer Biryani
fields.description: Authentic paneer biryani Fresh pieces of paneer are marinated in a specially prepared spice blend for maximum flavor. it serves two and is slightly spicy.

fields.name: All American Cheese Burger
fields.description: The Living Legend! Grilled Chicken Breast slammed with an additional cheese burst patty Serving

fields.name: Ferrero Rocher Fudge Sundae
fields.description: Ferrero Rocher pastry, scoop of vanilla, chocolate sauce topped with whipped cream and a Ferrero rocher chocolate for good measure.

fields.name: Butter Idli
fields.description: Idli tossed in spicy podi and butter

fields.name: Sagu Masala Dosa
fields.description: Thick crispy dosa served with sagu and chutney

fields.name: The All English Breakfast
fields.description: Chicken Sausages, Bacon (Pork), 2 Fried Eggs, Baked Beans, Sauteed Mushrooms, Mashed Potato, Spinach and Grilled Tomato, Served with 2 slices of Brown Bread n Butter

fields.name: Death By Chocolate (DBC)
fields.description: Iconic chocolate sundae with cake and hot fudge

fields.name: Cake Fudge
fields.description: Vanilla ice cream with chocolate cake and hot fudge

fields.name: Chicken Boneless Biryani
fields.description: We use long grain basmati rice, and the boneless pieces of chicken are cooked in our own andra spice blend. it is spicy and served with raita and gravy. it serves two
